biological_replicate: 7 patients with heart disease and 4 healthy donors
from patients diagnosed with DCM and end-stage HF who underwent heart transplantation (n = 7) and age-matched donors without any heart disease (n = 4)
technical_replicate: These mice were subsequently treated by daily gavage with control solvent or HHQ16 at different doses of 1, 3, 10, 30 and 100 mg/kg
experimental_design: HHQ16 vs control in LADL-induced ischemia
the effects of HHQ16 on HF mice caused by the left anterior descending coronary artery ligation (LADL)-induced ischemia
factor_value: These mice were subsequently treated by daily gavage with control solvent or HHQ16
